titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/343

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=509 status=draft modified=2022-11-01 17:01:18.132375+00 | translation moa=510 status=draft modified=2018-12-11 13:21:19.641738+00

p.cl: Vniuersis Christi fidelibus ad quos presentes littere peruenerint . Gvydo de Normanuilla . Miles  eternam in domino salutem .

Nouerint uniuersitas uestra . quod cum ego Domino Thome fratri meo
dedissem in excambium terre sue de . Anegus . quam habuit ex dono Domine Matildis . comitisse de Anegus . totam terram meam de Machustum . sitam inter le . Denes . cum mesua
gio . tofto . et crofto . cum omnibus pertinentiis . aisiamentis et libertatibus ad eandem spectantibus . uel spectare debentibus . que tenui de domino Waleranno fratre meo . et eidem
Th’ . corporalem eiusdem quare dedissem possessionem  idem Th’ . frater meus eandem terram de Machust’ cum omnibus premissis dicto Waleranno . fratre meo . et me presentibus
et consentientibus . ecclesie sancte Marie de Melros . et Monachis ibidem deo seruientibus in elemosinam contulit perpetuam  prout in carta sua plenius continetur . Necnon et in
eadem terra personaliter existens  eosdem Monacos in eiusdem terre induxit possessionem . Et tam ego quam heredes mei omnia premissa eisdem Monachis imperpetuum . uuaran
tizabimus . et defendemus contra omnes . ita quod nec uir nec mulier eos occasione trium solidorum . uel unius tercelli domino feodi temporibus transactis non solutorum . nec etiam super
premissis siue ratione premissorum in parte uel in toto nomine dotis siue alio modo quacumque occasione uexare poterit uel inquietare . Et tam ego quam prefatus
Walterannus . frater meus dictam donationem ratam habentes et gratam approbamus eandem . et omnia premissa eisdem monachis hac presenti carta confirmamus .

In cuius
rei testimonium . et munimen  presenti scripto sigilla nostra apposuimus .

Hiis testibus . Domino Willelmo . de haud’ . constabulario . de Rokesb’ . ad hoc uocato . Domino Ricardo .
burnard’ . Ricard’ . domino de Rotherford’ . Waltero de Wodeford’ . Symone de Fard’ . senescallo . de farmgd’ . Walter . filio . hugonis . senescal’ . de ueteri Roxburg’ . Petro
preposito de bouild’ . Huthred’ . todde  et Multis aliis .
Datum anno gracie . Millesimo . ducentesimo . quinquagesimo  In uigilia sancti Mathei Apostoli .

div.p: To all Christ's faithful to whom the present letters shall have come, Guy de Normanville, knight, wishes eternal well-being in the Lord. Let all of you know that since I had given to the lord Thomas, my brother, in exchange for his land of Angus, which he had from the gift of the lady Matilda, countess of Angus, my entire land of Maxton, situated between the 'Denes', with messuage, toft, and croft, with all pertinents, easements and liberties belonging to it, or that ought to belong to it, which I held of the lord Waleran, my brother; and to the same Thomas had I given corporeal possession of the same; the same Thomas, my brother, the same land of Maxton with all the aforementioned, the said Waleran, my brother, and I being present and consenting,
